query:
SELECT swl.productName, swl.productType, swl.amountExGst, swl.enterpriseName, swl.serviceRefId
FROM supplier_workbook_line_items swl
JOIN supplier_workbook_uploads swu ON swu.id = swl.uploadId
WHERE swl.matchedCustomerExternalId = (SELECT externalId FROM customers WHERE name LIKE '%ASG Hail%' LIMIT 1)
  AND (swl.productName LIKE '%Webex Basic%' OR swl.productName LIKE '%UCXcel%')
LIMIT 20;
